payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Traditional tabletop lamp with a beige, seamed fabric shade emitting warm yellow light; dark bronze decorative metal base is visible at the lower crop and is partially cut off by the image edge, shade shows a darker shadowed area on the upper-left; estimated ~0.8 m from camera.
